details.test: Task 1: Subscribe to CO U.S. Senate candidate climate & immigration updates
Task 2: RSVP to free weekend town hall within 10 miles of 19103 in Oct 2024
Task 3: Pledge weekly Tuesday evening phone-banking with ZIP 60616
Task 4: Sign national and California voting-rights petitions
Task 5: Send message to U.S. Senator about Climate Bill H.R. 1234
Task 6: Create 3-action personal campaign plan (pledge, volunteer, spread-the-word) and set pledge to $15
Task 7: Favorite City Council District 5 candidate with more healthcare bullet points
Task 8: Save three recent Student Debt articles to reading list
Task 9: Join most active immigration-focused team in Travis County, TX as Online Organizer
